test_screener_option.sqlSyntax: SELECT id, '其他' AS 產業類別, 0 AS 最新營收 FROM basic_information WHERE 1=0
test_screener_option.title: {date} {year}年{month}月 {option} 第{page}頁

test_screener_option_2.sqlSyntax: SELECT id, 0 AS eps, 0 AS last_eps, 0 AS growth FROM basic_information WHERE 1=0
test_screener_option_2.title: {date} {year}年Q{season} {option} 第{page}頁
